title: ilex cristata
intro: Ilex cristata is a type of dwarf holly plant, native to eastern North America, characterized by its compact growth and small, dark green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ilex cristata are said to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
